To: T. Adeyemi
From: PC
Subject: WBS Review

Hi T,

Thanks for sharing the draft. I had a quick look. Overall I think it looks comprehensive — you have covered the main areas (discovery, build, testing, deployment) and the rollout waves are clearly broken down which is great.

A couple of small thoughts:

- The teller application section (1.2.1) has a lot of sub-items which is good detail. I wonder if we could add a few more under core banking integration (1.2.2) and customer records migration (1.2.3) just for completeness?
- Under testing (1.3) maybe we should add some performance testing? I would leverage testing best practices to ensure we drive quality outcomes here.
- We should also think about communication with stakeholders throughout the project. Good stakeholder engagement is critical to project success.

For the budget number the COO is asking for by week 5, I am sure the WBS as drafted gives us enough to work with. Once we apply rates to each work package we should be able to roll up a number for finance.

On the validation question — I think it is fine for you to baseline this and then share with the leads. They can flag any specific concerns when they see it. Calling everyone into a workshop feels like overkill for something we need by end of week.

Happy to take on whatever next steps you need.

Best,
PC
